title: Barnyard Follies
writer: Dorrell McGowan, Stuart E. McGowan, Robert T. Shannon
actors: Mary Lee, Rufe Davis, June Storey
plot: Pappy, the manager of the Farmdale orphanage, appropriates five thousand dollars of the taxpayers' money to enroll his charges in a 4-H project that could make the orphanage self-sufficient. This infuriates Hiram Crabtree and Sam ...
